title: Cave Dweller Reimagined
description: Fork of Cave Dweller Reimagined with fabric support
body:
**REQUIRES [GECKOLIB](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib)**

**CONFIG INSIDE THE GAME REQUIRES [CLOTH CONFIG API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config) AND [MOD MENU](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu?fromcf)**

**This mod is not made by me, original mod is [Cave Dweller Evolved (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dweller-evolved-\(fabric\)) by [IshKaigen](https://modrinth.com/user/IshKaigen), this is just a port.**

**None of the work in this mod was created by me! I simply combined a few mods into one because, separately, they were incompatible. All credit goes to the respective mod creators. Do not ask me to improve certain aspects of the mod; again, I'm not the developer behind all this work.**

**This mod contains:**

- **[Cave Dweller Evolved (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dweller-evolved-\(fabric\)) by [IshKaigen](https://modrinth.com/user/IshKaigen)**
- **[Enhanced Cave Noise (Texture/Geo)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enhanced-cave-noise-jar) by [Schpalrbo](https://www.curseforge.com/members/schpalrbo/projects)**

**READ! If you want to use the Enhanced Cave Dweller sounds, You can download the [Cave Dweller Sound Overhaul](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cave-dweller-sound-overhaul) by [Scorchy](https://www.curseforge.com/members/scorchy/projects). It Works with all versions!**
